body_txt: The person on the receiving end may react in a number of ways, from stoically putting up with it, to casually wafting it away, to breaking into a racking fit of coughing . In cartoons the cloud of smoke may dissipate to reveal an Ash Face . A Sub-Trope of Good Smoking, Evil Smoking ; this behaviour will generally be an indicator of an Evil Smoker, although a good Cigar Chomper may be able to get away with it (especially if the target has earned his contempt ).
